author: 0xunclebill
content:
we recently were talking about the fact that we need nodes to send out payload attestation votes even for payloads that aren't canonical.

For us to support this, we first need to make our vc aware of all dependent roots for a given epoch (not just our canonical one).  I think we need a beacon api spec change to allow for this https://github.com/ethereum/beacon-APIs/blob/master/apis/validator/duties/ptc.yaml

Right now the response is `dependent_root, execution_optimistic, [PtcDuty]`

but what we really need is something like `[dependent_root, execution_optimistic, [PtcDuty]]`

correct?
